limitations: The first two candidates came from the base April 17 phased evidence pass.
The third candidate was added through a narrow supplemental single-candidate probe after the first phased run ended with only 2 suppliers.
The supplemental hongfu probe required transcript normalization because Hermes emitted JSON with a banner and trailing session metadata.
